subject: BLADE_STRIKE: cutting deck struck a foreign object on a roadside verge, unit MOW-NX3-07
description: Onboard vision flagged a hard blade strike against a foreign object (suspected metal debris) on a roadside verge. Blade RPM dropped then spiked; deck vibration over threshold. Unit was mowing a near-road verge on route 12.

evidence.caption: Onboard capture — deck contact with debris
